Name: Door Unit Microcontroller
Description: Main controller for proximity sensing, server communication (WiFi), and lock actuation. Features integrated WiFi and Bluetooth LE.

Name: Electric Strike
Description: Electrically controlled lock mechanism for door access. Requires 12V DC to operate.

Name: Electric Strike Relay Module
Description: Switches the high current for the electric strike based on MCU signal.

Name: Door Position Sensor
Description: Detects if the door is open or closed, providing feedback to the MCU for tracking.

Name: Door Unit Power Supply
Description: Provides main power to the entire door unit, including the electric strike and voltage regulation.

Name: 12V to 5V Buck Converter
Description: Steps down the 12V supply to 5V for the MCU and RFID/NFC reader.

Name: Door Unit Main Enclosure Back
Description: Back half of the door unit enclosure, designed to mount flush against a wall or door frame, with internal standoffs for the PCB mounting plate and cutouts for cable routing.

Name: Internal PCB Mounting Plate
Description: An internal plate with integrated standoffs and mounting points for the microcontroller, buck converter, and relay module, designed to fit within the enclosure halves.

Name: Door Sensor Magnet Housing
Description: Small enclosure for the magnet component of the door position sensor, designed to be mounted on the moving part of the door.

Name: Door Sensor Main Body Mount
Description: Mounting bracket/housing for the reed switch component of the door position sensor, designed for secure attachment to the door frame.

Name: M3 Threaded Heat-Set Inserts
Description: Brass inserts embedded into the 3D-printed enclosure for robust, repeatable assembly with machine screws.

Name: M3 Machine Screws
Description: Used to assemble the front and back halves of the main enclosure, screwing into the heat-set inserts.

Name: PCB Mounting Screws
Description: Small screws to secure the microcontroller, buck converter, and relay module to the internal PCB mounting plate.

Name: Wall Mounting Screws
Description: Screws for securely attaching the entire door unit enclosure to a wall or door frame.

Name: Cable Gland M12
Description: Provides waterproof and strain-relieved entry points for the power cable and electric strike/door sensor cables into the enclosure.

Name: Simplified Main Enclosure Front
Description: Front half of the door unit enclosure, updated with a solid faceplate for a clean aesthetic. Designed for wall mounting.

Name: Main Control Server
Description: Acts as the central server for managing authorized devices, access schedules, and logging entry events. Communicates securely with the door unit over WiFi.

Name: Server Power Supply
Product Name: Official Raspberry Pi 15.3W USB-C Power Supply
Description: Provides 5.1V 3A power to the Raspberry Pi server via USB-C.
